creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
The above patch fixes the build for me, but produces this warning:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/bin/node is linked to /usr/local/lib/libc++.so.1 from devel/libc++ but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libc++.so:devel/libc++
